svg.text: One forward pass per memory → five classification outputs. Per-deployment LoRA adapter over frozen BERT-base. 2.4 MB per adapter. F1 = 1.000 on gold.

g.text: 20-65 ms p95 on Apple Silicon MPS
All five heads share the encoder.
Every head emits a softmax distribution.
the next backend on that head only.
Topic vocabulary lives in the adapter's

svg.text: GLiNER is NOT in this chain — it runs in parallel for entity NER (knowledge-graph population).

g.text: Adapter Artifact Layout — 2.4 MB per deployment
├── manifest.json ← encoder, label vocabs, gate metrics
└── eval_report.md ← PASS/FAIL gate + per-head F1 table
